locations_inspected.name: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc.
findings: Wet Pipe sprinkler system, manufacturer: Viking, system age: 28 years, NFPA 13 compliant
3 control valves inspected - all found in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair - minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: Yes - adequate supply
deficiencies: [Advisory] Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
[Priority] Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials - remove stored materials to restore required clearance
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room - install missing junction box covers and address exposed wiring
Supervisory signal deficiency noted - investigate and repair supervisory signal system

overall_assessment.summary: Fire protection system inspection of a 28-year-old Viking Wet Pipe sprinkler system. System passed overall with an average risk grade of 3. Minor corrosion observed on sprinkler heads. Two electrical deficiencies identified including a priority item for exposed wiring and missing junction box covers. Supervisory signal deficiency also noted. Water supply is adequate.
